project.name: MemberBase
project.description: Open-source PHP NGO member management system with accounting, CSV import, REST API and role-based access control

nodes.name: Dockerfile
nodes.summary: Builds the application's PHP 8.2 Apache image: installs pdo/pdo_mysql extensions and pdftk-java, enables Apache modules (rewrite, headers, expires, deflate, brotli), copies the Apache vhost config, and prepares writable log/conf directories owned by www-data.
nodes.languageNotes: Single-stage Dockerfile based on the official php:8.2-apache image; combines apt-get install and cleanup in one RUN layer to keep image size down.

nodes.name: php
nodes.summary: The single build stage/image produced by the Dockerfile, based on php:8.2-apache with PDO MySQL support and pdftk-java for PDF attestation generation.

nodes.name: docker-compose.yml
nodes.summary: Local development orchestration: builds the PHP app from the project Dockerfile, and runs MariaDB, Mailpit (SMTP testing), and Adminer (DB admin UI) as companion services with health-checked startup ordering.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses a MariaDB healthcheck with depends_on.condition: service_healthy so the PHP container waits for the database to be ready before starting.

nodes.name: php
nodes.summary: Application container built from the project Dockerfile, exposed on port 8080, bind-mounting html/conf/logs, and configured to connect to the mariadb service.

nodes.name: mariadb
nodes.summary: MariaDB 11 database service with a persisted named volume, an initdb bind mount for seed scripts, and a healthcheck gating dependent services.

nodes.name: mailpit
nodes.summary: Mailpit SMTP capture service used for local/E2E testing of outgoing email, exposing a web UI on 8025 and SMTP on 1025 with permissive auth for tests.

nodes.name: adminer
nodes.summary: Adminer database administration UI exposed on port 8082, depending on the mariadb service for local database inspection.

nodes.name: docker-compose.test.yml
nodes.summary: Docker Compose override file used for the E2E/CI test environment, pointing the php service at a separate members_test database.

nodes.name: CHANGELOG.md
nodes.summary: Chronological release log for MemberBase, documenting every version from 2.0.0 through 3.8.0 with new features, fixes, security notes, and internal refactors per release.

nodes.name: CLAUDE.md
nodes.summary: Project development conventions for AI-assisted coding: commit identity rules, code style (English comments, no hardcoded labels), i18n, CSRF protection, htmx redirects, CSV import wizard, testing, DB migrations, and release process.

nodes.name: CONTRIBUTING.md
nodes.summary: Contributor guide covering local setup, tech stack, coding guidelines (CSRF, migrations, dirty-form guard), commit conventions, E2E/unit testing, and how to report bugs or suggest features.

nodes.name: DESIGN.md
nodes.summary: Design system reference for Casa Membres: color palette, typography, UI components (navbar, DataTable, forms, badges, cards), a Bootstrap 4-to-5 upgrade checklist, and do's/don'ts.

nodes.name: MIGRATION_PROD.md
nodes.summary: Production database migration workflow: applying schema changes, backup/restore procedures, HTTP security headers, Apache API route configuration, and role assignment notes.

nodes.name: Makefile
nodes.summary: Developer task runner exposing targets for Docker lifecycle (up/down/logs/shell/db), CSV import, backup/restore, database migrations, releases, site publishing, and running E2E/unit test suites.
nodes.languageNotes: Make targets wrap docker compose exec and composer/npx invocations, acting as the single entry point for local dev and release operations.

nodes.name: PRODUCT.md
nodes.summary: Product brief defining MemberBase's target register, user personas, purpose, brand personality, anti-references, design principles, and accessibility commitments.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Main project README describing MemberBase's features (member management, segments, accounting, activity views, donation receipts, REST API), tech stack, project structure, installation (web installer and Docker), deployment, and security/roles.

nodes.name: composer.json
nodes.summary: Composer manifest declaring the project as a PHP AGPL-licensed package with PHPUnit as a dev dependency and a composer script for running unit tests.

nodes.name: package.json
nodes.summary: npm manifest for the project's tooling side, defining metadata and devDependencies (Playwright) used to run the end-to-end test suite.

nodes.name: phpunit.xml
nodes.summary: PHPUnit configuration wiring up the unit test suite bootstrap and test directory used to run business-logic tests without a database.

nodes.name: users
nodes.summary: Core members table storing personal details (name, address, contact info) and the `status` active/inactive flag used to filter all member listings.

nodes.name: team
nodes.summary: Defines named teams/groups used to segment members for filtering and access scoping.

nodes.name: user_properties
nodes.summary: Stores extended/custom key-value properties attached to member records.

nodes.name: metagroup
nodes.summary: Defines combined segments (metagroups) that group multiple teams for reporting and filtering purposes.

nodes.name: compta_type
nodes.summary: Lookup table of accounting transaction types used to categorize entries in the compta (accounting) module.

nodes.name: compta
nodes.summary: Accounting ledger table recording financial transactions (donations/dues) linked to members, feeding donation receipts and reporting.

nodes.name: maxval
nodes.summary: Utility table tracking maximum/sequence values used for numbering or counters within the application.

nodes.name: app_settings
nodes.summary: Key-value store for application-wide configuration settings managed via the admin Settings screens.

nodes.name: app_users
nodes.summary: Application user accounts table (admin/staff logins) storing credentials, role, and locale preference used for authentication and i18n.

nodes.name: audit_log
nodes.summary: Append-only audit trail recording user actions across the application for accountability and traceability.

nodes.name: email_templates
nodes.summary: Stores reusable email templates (subject/body) used for member communications and reminders.

nodes.name: email_log
nodes.summary: Log of sent emails, linked to templates and recipients, used to track communication history and debug delivery via Mailpit in tests.

nodes.name: schema_migrations
nodes.summary: Tracks applied database migrations by filename and checksum, enabling drift detection and preventing re-application of already-run migrations.

nodes.name: ONBOARDING.md
nodes.summary: Developer onboarding guide covering the project overview, the 13 architecture layers, key concepts, a guided 8-step tour, a file-to-layer map, complexity hotspots, and local setup instructions (Docker, Playwright E2E tests).

nodes.name: admin.md
nodes.summary: Administrator guide covering installation, configuration, Apache/Docker deployment, user account management, security (Fail2Ban, audit log), the REST API, backups, schema updates, and audit logging for MemberBase.

nodes.name: api.md
nodes.summary: Full REST API reference documenting authentication, roles/permissions, response formats, and all endpoints for members, groups, compta (accounting), compta types, and suivi (follow-up notes), each with query parameters, request bodies, responses, and curl examples.

nodes.name: architecture.md
nodes.summary: Technical architecture document describing request flows (GET via htmx, POST actions), the layered architecture, database schema and domain classes (User, Team, Compta, Metagroup, UserProperty), authentication/roles, the REST API structure, CSV import wizard, frontend stack, PDF attestation generation, testing/CI, and code conventions.

nodes.name: user.md
nodes.summary: End-user guide for MemberBase covering login/navigation, the member list, adding and importing members, member detail tabs, accounting (compta) entries, follow-up notes (suivi), donation journals and overviews, tax attestations, segments, settings, roles/permissions matrix, and password/logout flows.

nodes.name: users
nodes.summary: Pre-migration snapshot of the users table, deliberately missing the email_alt column added by migration 0001, used to verify migrate.php upgrades a dirty legacy schema.

nodes.name: compta
nodes.summary: Pre-migration snapshot of the compta table with sum stored as VARCHAR(64) and dirty values (comma decimals, empty, non-numeric), used to verify migration 0002 converts it to DECIMAL and cleans data.

nodes.name: app_users
nodes.summary: Pre-migration snapshot of the app_users table without the locale column, used to verify migration 0003 adds it during the CI upgrade test.

nodes.name: app_settings
nodes.summary: Pre-migration snapshot of the app_settings table with value stored as VARCHAR(255), used to verify migration 0004 widens it to TEXT.

nodes.name: seed.sql (app_users seed)
nodes.summary: Deterministic seed data inserting one app_users row per role (admin, manager, user, readonly) all sharing the bcrypt password TestPassword1! for Playwright E2E login tests.

nodes.name: seed.sql (users seed)
nodes.summary: Deterministic member seed data covering active, archived and lapsed membership statuses used to exercise listing and filtering flows in E2E tests.

nodes.name: seed.sql (compta seed)
nodes.summary: Deterministic accounting seed data (cotisation entries per member and year) used to test lapsed/active membership detection and attestation flows.

nodes.name: seed.sql (app_settings seed)
nodes.summary: Deterministic application settings seed pointing SMTP configuration at the local Mailpit container and defining default team filters for tests.

nodes.name: reset-db.sh
nodes.summary: Test database reset script that drops and recreates the members_test MariaDB database, applies schema.sql and seed.sql, writes conf/db.php, baselines migrations, and purges the Mailpit inbox so E2E tests start from a clean deterministic state.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses `docker compose exec` to pipe SQL files directly into the mariadb container rather than mounting them as init scripts, allowing repeated resets without container restarts.

nodes.name: suivi.php
nodes.summary: REST API endpoint implementing CRUD for member follow-up/tracking entries ("suivi"), with permission checks and audit logging.

nodes.name: entryToArray
nodes.summary: Converts a follow-up (suivi) entity into a plain array for JSON serialization.

nodes.name: requestBody
nodes.summary: Reads and JSON-decodes the raw HTTP request body for suivi API calls.

nodes.name: loadEntry
nodes.summary: Loads a suivi entry by id, erroring with 404 if not found.

nodes.name: handleList
nodes.summary: Handles GET list requests for follow-up entries.

nodes.name: handleGet
nodes.summary: Handles GET requests for a single follow-up entry by id.

nodes.name: handleCreate
nodes.summary: Handles POST requests creating a new follow-up entry, with audit logging.

nodes.name: handleUpdate
nodes.summary: Handles PUT requests updating an existing follow-up entry, with audit logging.

nodes.name: handleDelete
nodes.summary: Handles DELETE requests removing a follow-up entry, with audit logging.

nodes.name: attestation_bulk.php
nodes.summary: Generates a bulk FDF (Forms Data Format) file used to pre-fill PDF donation attestations for multiple members at once.
nodes.languageNotes: Implements custom fdf_escape_name/fdf_encode_value/fdf_generate helpers to build FDF payloads for Adobe PDF form filling.

nodes.name: fdf_escape_name
nodes.summary: Escapes a field name for safe inclusion in an FDF (Forms Data Format) document.

nodes.name: fdf_encode_value
nodes.summary: Encodes a field value string for safe inclusion in an FDF document.

nodes.name: fdf_generate
nodes.summary: Builds a complete FDF payload string from an associative array of PDF form field values.

nodes.name: attestation_don.php
nodes.summary: Generates a single-member FDF file to pre-fill a PDF donation attestation, mirroring the bulk variant for one recipient.
nodes.languageNotes: Duplicates the fdf_escape_name/fdf_encode_value/fdf_generate helpers found in attestation_bulk.php.

nodes.name: fdf_escape_name
nodes.summary: Escapes a field name for safe inclusion in an FDF (Forms Data Format) document.

nodes.name: fdf_encode_value
nodes.summary: Encodes a field value string for safe inclusion in an FDF document.

nodes.name: fdf_generate
nodes.summary: Builds a complete FDF payload string from an associative array of PDF form field values.

nodes.name: .htaccess
nodes.summary: Apache access rule denying direct web access to the internal PHP class files.

nodes.name: compta_class.php
nodes.summary: Defines the Compta domain class modeling an accounting/donation entry, with CRUD persistence and static helpers for per-user type summaries and yearly activity totals.

nodes.name: Compta
nodes.summary: Domain model representing a single accounting entry (dues/donation) tied to a user, with getters/setters, DB lookup/save/remove, and aggregate reporting helpers.

nodes.name: lookupCompta
nodes.summary: Loads a Compta entity by database id, hydrating all fields from the compta table.

nodes.name: setCotisationYear
nodes.summary: Sets the cotisation year field, deriving it from the entry date when not explicitly provided.

nodes.name: save
nodes.summary: Inserts or updates the accounting entry row, choosing INSERT vs UPDATE based on whether an id is set.

nodes.name: typesByUser
nodes.summary: Static helper returning, for a set of user ids, which accounting entry types each user has recorded.

nodes.name: activitySummaryByUser
nodes.summary: Static helper aggregating per-user accounting activity totals for a given year.

nodes.name: member_filter_class.php
nodes.summary: Defines the MemberFilter class resolving 'virtual filter' member lists (e.g. non-paying members) used by dynamic member views.

nodes.name: MemberFilter
nodes.summary: Resolves special virtual member filters (like unpaid-dues members) into concrete user ID lists via targeted SQL queries.

nodes.name: resolveIds
nodes.summary: Resolves a named virtual filter (e.g. unpaid dues members) into a concrete list of matching user ids via SQL.

nodes.name: noCotiMembers
nodes.summary: Returns the ids of members who have not paid dues for the configured cotisation window.

nodes.name: metagroup_class.php
nodes.summary: Defines the Metagroup domain class representing a collection of teams, with CRUD persistence and team-membership helpers.

nodes.name: Metagroup
nodes.summary: Domain model representing a metagroup (grouping of teams), with lookup/save/remove and helpers to list member team names/ids and usage checks.

nodes.name: lookupMetagroup
nodes.summary: Loads a Metagroup entity by database id.

nodes.name: save
nodes.summary: Inserts or updates the metagroup row.

nodes.name: filterList
nodes.summary: Returns all metagroups for use in filter/dropdown UI.

nodes.name: teamNames
nodes.summary: Returns the names of teams belonging to a given metagroup.

nodes.name: remove
nodes.summary: Deletes the metagroup row after checking it is not currently referenced.

nodes.name: property_class.php
nodes.summary: Defines the UserProperty class modeling arbitrary key/value properties attached to a user (e.g. group membership flags).

nodes.name: UserProperty
nodes.summary: Domain model for a single user property record (parameter/value pair) with lookup/save/remove persistence methods.

nodes.name: lookupUserProperty
nodes.summary: Loads a UserProperty entity by database id.

nodes.name: save
nodes.summary: Inserts or updates the user property row.

nodes.name: team_class.php
nodes.summary: Defines the Team domain class representing a group/team, with CRUD persistence, dropdown listing, and metagroup membership management.

nodes.name: Team
nodes.summary: Domain model representing a team, with lookup/save/remove, dropdown listing, and metagroup membership add/remove/check operations.

nodes.name: lookupTeam
nodes.summary: Loads a Team entity by database id.

nodes.name: save
nodes.summary: Inserts or updates the team row.

nodes.name: listForDropdown
nodes.summary: Returns teams formatted for dropdown/select UI, optionally including hidden teams.

nodes.name: remove
nodes.summary: Deletes the team row after checking it is not currently referenced.

nodes.name: user_class.php
nodes.summary: Defines the core User domain class modeling a member record, with full CRUD, extensive getters/setters, membership/payment status helpers, and the filtered listing query used by the members list view.

nodes.name: User
nodes.summary: Central domain model for a member/user, providing lookup by id/email, hydration from a DB row, full field accessors, payment/donation status checks, team membership management, and a filterable listWithFilters() query builder.

nodes.name: hydrateFromRow
nodes.summary: Populates a User instance's fields from a database result row.

nodes.name: lookupUser
nodes.summary: Loads a User entity by database id.

nodes.name: save
nodes.summary: Inserts or updates the user row, choosing INSERT vs UPDATE based on whether an id is set.

nodes.name: listWithFilters
nodes.summary: Builds and executes the filtered/paginated member listing query used by the main members list view.

nodes.name: export.php
nodes.summary: Admin-only script producing a pure-SQL database dump for backup/export without relying on mysqldump, exposed via the Settings > Health page.

nodes.name: health.php
nodes.summary: Health-check endpoint returning JSON status (DB connectivity, migration state) used for monitoring and uptime checks.

nodes.name: health_respond
nodes.summary: Emits a JSON health-check response with the given status and HTTP code.

nodes.name: bug_report.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub issue form template for bug reports, structuring fields for description, labels, and body sections.

nodes.name: feature_request.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub issue form template for feature requests, structuring fields for description, labels, and body sections.

nodes.name: pull_request_template.md
nodes.summary: Pull request template prompting contributors to describe what the PR does, why, changes made, testing performed, and a completion checklist.

nodes.name: config.json
nodes.summary: Configuration for the impeccable design-review tool, defining a detector used for UI/UX audits of the project.

nodes.name: .understandignore
nodes.summary: Ignore-list configuration for the Understand-Anything knowledge-graph analyzer, excluding paths from indexing.

nodes.name: apache.conf
nodes.summary: Apache virtual host configuration for the Dockerized environment, setting document root, rewrite rules, and PHP handling for the app.

nodes.name: 0F5B592E883E10E5F744B70B861AE02B.txt
nodes.summary: Small text file, likely a domain/host verification token placed at the web root (e.g. for a hosting or SSL provider).

nodes.name: .htaccess
nodes.summary: Apache access rules for the /api directory controlling routing and access to REST endpoint scripts.

nodes.name: _bootstrap.php
nodes.summary: Shared bootstrap for REST API endpoints, providing the apiError() helper for consistent JSON error responses and audit logging.

nodes.name: apiError
nodes.summary: Sends a JSON error response with the given HTTP status code and message, then logs the failure via auditLog.

nodes.name: compta-types.php
nodes.summary: REST endpoint returning the list of accounting entry types (compta_type) as JSON for use by client-side forms and filters.

nodes.name: compta.php
nodes.summary: REST API endpoint implementing full CRUD (list, get, create, update, delete) for member accounting/donation entries, with permission checks and audit logging.

nodes.name: entryToArray
nodes.summary: Converts a Compta entity into a plain array suitable for JSON serialization in API responses.

nodes.name: requestBody
nodes.summary: Reads and JSON-decodes the raw HTTP request body, erroring out on invalid JSON.

nodes.name: applyFields
nodes.summary: Applies allowed fields from a decoded request body onto a Compta entity before persistence.

nodes.name: validateTypeId
nodes.summary: Validates that a given accounting type id is a known compta_type, erroring otherwise.

nodes.name: handleList
nodes.summary: Handles GET list requests for accounting entries, applying user/date filters and returning paginated JSON results.

nodes.name: handleGet
nodes.summary: Handles GET requests for a single accounting entry by id.

nodes.name: handleCreate
nodes.summary: Handles POST requests creating a new accounting entry, validating input and writing an audit log entry.

nodes.name: handleUpdate
nodes.summary: Handles PUT/PATCH requests updating an existing accounting entry and logging the change.

nodes.name: handleDelete
nodes.summary: Handles DELETE requests removing an accounting entry and logging the removal.

nodes.name: groups.php
nodes.summary: REST API endpoint managing teams/groups: CRUD for group records plus member listing, addition, and removal, guarded by manager-role checks.

nodes.name: requestBody
nodes.summary: Reads and JSON-decodes the raw HTTP request body for group API calls.

nodes.name: loadGroup
nodes.summary: Loads a Team entity by id, erroring with 404 if not found.

nodes.name: groupToArray
nodes.summary: Converts a team database row into a plain array for JSON serialization.

nodes.name: handleList
nodes.summary: Handles GET list requests for teams/groups, returning all groups as JSON.

nodes.name: handleGet
nodes.summary: Handles GET requests for a single group by id, including its details.

nodes.name: handleListMembers
nodes.summary: Handles GET requests listing the members belonging to a given group.

nodes.name: handleCreate
nodes.summary: Handles POST requests creating a new group, restricted to managers, with audit logging.

nodes.name: handleUpdate
nodes.summary: Handles PUT requests updating a group's name/visibility, restricted to managers.

nodes.name: handleDelete
nodes.summary: Handles DELETE requests removing a group if unused, restricted to managers.

nodes.name: handleAddMember
nodes.summary: Handles POST requests adding a member to a group, restricted to managers.

nodes.name: handleRemoveMember
nodes.summary: Handles DELETE requests removing a member from a group, restricted to managers.

nodes.name: members.php
nodes.summary: REST API endpoint for member management: paginated/filtered listing (including virtual filters), CRUD operations, and nested group/accounting lookups per member.

nodes.name: memberFieldsForDiff
nodes.summary: Extracts a normalized set of member fields from a User entity for audit-log diffing.

nodes.name: memberToArray
nodes.summary: Converts a User entity into a plain array for JSON serialization in API responses.

nodes.name: requestBody
nodes.summary: Reads and JSON-decodes the raw HTTP request body for member API calls.

nodes.name: applyFields
nodes.summary: Applies allowed fields from a decoded request body onto a User entity before persistence.

nodes.name: emitMemberList
nodes.summary: Builds and emits the paginated JSON member list response, including group and accounting-type metadata per row.

nodes.name: handleVirtualFilter
nodes.summary: Resolves and paginates a virtual member filter (e.g. unpaid dues) using MemberFilter and emits the result list.

nodes.name: handleList
nodes.summary: Handles GET list requests for members, applying search, team, and virtual filters with pagination and sorting.

nodes.name: handleGet
nodes.summary: Handles GET requests for a single member by id.

nodes.name: handleCreate
nodes.summary: Handles POST requests creating a new member record.

nodes.name: handleUpdate
nodes.summary: Handles PUT requests updating an existing member's fields, with audit-log diffing.

nodes.name: handleDelete
nodes.summary: Handles DELETE requests removing a member record.

nodes.name: handleGetGroups
nodes.summary: Handles GET requests listing the groups/teams a given member belongs to.

nodes.name: handleGetCompta
nodes.summary: Handles GET requests listing a given member's accounting/donation entries.

nodes.name: .htaccess
nodes.summary: Apache access rule denying all direct HTTP requests to the includes directory, forcing all access through index.php.

nodes.name: auth.php
nodes.summary: Action handler for authentication-related requests: logout, locale change, password change, and app user (admin account) management.

nodes.name: compta.php
nodes.summary: Action handler for accounting entries: create, update, and toggle attestation flag, with optional receipt email and audit logging.

nodes.name: groups.php
nodes.summary: Action handler for group/team management: create, rename, delete, reassign, bulk visibility operations, and metagroup category assignment.

nodes.name: import.php
nodes.summary: Action handler driving the 3-step CSV/TSV member import wizard: upload, apply, and duplicate resolution.

nodes.name: importRedirect
nodes.summary: Redirects the client to a URL, using HX-Location for htmx requests and Location otherwise, then exits.

nodes.name: maintenance.php
nodes.summary: Action handler for applying pending DB migrations from the admin Health settings tab, guarded by admin role, backup confirmation, and a recent-export check.

nodes.name: members.php
nodes.summary: Action handler for member record create and update operations, capturing before/after field diffs for the audit log.

nodes.name: metagroups.php
nodes.summary: Action handler for metagroup (category) management: reorder, assign teams to categories, create, update, and delete metagroups.

nodes.name: settings.php
nodes.summary: Action handler for application settings: organization info, SMTP config, test email sending, email log maintenance, and accounting type CRUD.

nodes.name: suivi.php
nodes.summary: Action handler for follow-up (suivi) entries attached to a member: add and update.

nodes.name: auth.php
nodes.summary: Core authentication library: session bootstrap, login/logout, CSRF token generation and verification, and role-based access guards (isAdmin, isManager, canWrite, canRead). Loaded at the top of every protected page.
nodes.languageNotes: Sets secure session cookie params (httponly, samesite=Lax, HTTPS-aware secure flag) before session_start().

nodes.name: authUser
nodes.summary: Returns the currently authenticated app user as an object built from session data, or null if not logged in.

nodes.name: csrfToken
nodes.summary: Generates and caches a per-session CSRF token in $_SESSION using cryptographically secure random bytes.

nodes.name: csrfCheck
nodes.summary: Validates the request's CSRF token (header or hidden field) against the session token using a timing-safe comparison.

nodes.name: requireLogin
nodes.summary: Redirects to the login page and exits if the current session is not authenticated.

nodes.name: requirePasswordChange
nodes.summary: Forces navigation to the change-password view when the current user's force_password_change flag is set.

nodes.name: authLogin
nodes.summary: Authenticates a username/password pair against app_users, regenerates the session ID on success, and updates last_login.

nodes.name: authLogout
nodes.summary: Destroys the current session and expires the session cookie, logging the user out.

nodes.name: bootstrap.php
nodes.summary: Application bootstrap: sets timezone, defines APP_VERSION, establishes the DB connection (from conf/db.php or environment variables), and exposes shared max-value and audit-log helpers. Included by every page before any business logic.
nodes.languageNotes: Falls back from conf/db.php constants to getenv() for 12-factor/Docker style configuration.

nodes.name: pendingMigrations
nodes.summary: Computes the list of migration files not yet recorded as applied in schema_migrations.

nodes.name: migrationDrift
nodes.summary: Detects checksum drift between applied migration files on disk and their recorded checksums in schema_migrations, flagging tampering or accidental edits.

nodes.name: auditLog
nodes.summary: Inserts an entry into audit_log recording the acting app user, action name, detail text, and optional subject user id.

nodes.name: import_fields.php
nodes.summary: Single source of truth for CSV import field labels, allowed field keys, and per-row value normalization (sexe, quoting) used across the import wizard.

nodes.name: importFieldLabels
nodes.summary: Returns the localized map of importable field keys to their display labels, the canonical list used across the import wizard.

nodes.name: importAllowedFields
nodes.summary: Returns the list of allowed import field keys, derived from importFieldLabels.

nodes.name: importNormalizeSexe
nodes.summary: Normalizes a raw CSV sexe value (various textual forms) to the application's canonical M/F/other representation.

nodes.name: importFieldValue
nodes.summary: Applies field-specific normalization (sexe mapping, unquoting) to a raw CSV cell value based on the target field name.

nodes.name: migrations.php
nodes.summary: Shared, side-effect-free migration logic used by both the CLI tool (tools/migrate.php) and the admin web UI: enumerate migration files, compute checksums, track applied state, run pending migrations transactionally, and dump the database.

nodes.name: mbAllMigrations
nodes.summary: Lists all migration file versions found on disk in html/migrations, sorted.

nodes.name: mbAppliedMigrations
nodes.summary: Fetches the map of applied migration versions to their stored checksums from schema_migrations.

nodes.name: mbEnsureMigrationsTable
nodes.summary: Creates the schema_migrations tracking table if it does not already exist.

nodes.name: mbPendingMigrations
nodes.summary: Returns migration versions present on disk but not yet recorded as applied.

nodes.name: mbRunPendingMigrations
nodes.summary: Applies all pending migration SQL files inside a transaction, recording version and checksum in schema_migrations, and rolling back on error.
nodes.languageNotes: MySQL DDL statements auto-commit, so this only protects the tracking-table insert, not the DDL itself — documented in CLAUDE.md as a known limitation requiring pre-migration backups.

nodes.name: mbDumpDatabase
nodes.summary: Streams a pure-PHP SQL dump of the entire database (schema + data) without relying on mysqldump, used by the admin export feature.

nodes.name: pure.php
nodes.summary: Side-effect-free date and string helpers extracted for unit testing, includable outside the APP_ENTRY/PDO context.

nodes.name: formatedDateToTimeStamp
nodes.summary: Parses a locale-formatted date string into a Unix timestamp, returning null on parse failure.

nodes.name: timeStampToformatedDate
nodes.summary: Formats a Unix timestamp back into the application's display date format.

nodes.name: unquote
nodes.summary: Strips surrounding quote characters from a string value, used to clean CSV/form input.

nodes.name: donor_table.php
nodes.summary: Reusable donor/member DataTables-powered table partial, parameterized by caller-supplied rows, extra columns, and row link callback.

nodes.name: menu.php
nodes.summary: Renders the main responsive navigation bar with active-view highlighting for both mobile and desktop layouts.

nodes.name: actions.php
nodes.summary: Central action router: enforces CSRF verification on POST actions, maps action names to their handler files under includes/actions/, and dispatches the request.

nodes.name: views.php
nodes.summary: Central view router: declarative table mapping view names to include files, required auth guard, request overrides, and view variable overrides for sub-views.

nodes.name: auth_change_password.php
nodes.summary: Renders the change-password form, including a forced-change notice when the account requires a password reset.

nodes.name: compta_delete_confirm.php
nodes.summary: Renders a confirmation dialog before deleting an accounting entry.

nodes.name: compta_delete_do.php
nodes.summary: Deletes an accounting entry, writes an audit log entry, then re-renders the member's accounting tab.

nodes.name: compta_edit_form.php
nodes.summary: Renders the form used to create or edit an accounting entry for a given member.

nodes.name: compta_last_entry.php
nodes.summary: Renders the accounting entries list with sorting, year/type filtering, and attestation toggle support (the app's main accounting dashboard view).

nodes.name: _lec_type_swatch
nodes.summary: Renders a small colored badge/swatch for an accounting entry type, escaping label text for safe HTML output.

nodes.name: compta_list.php
nodes.summary: Generic accounting entries listing view with year and accounting-type filters, used outside the primary last-entry dashboard.

nodes.name: donors_lapsed.php
nodes.summary: Report view listing donors who gave in the prior year but not in the selected year, computed via a NOT IN subquery over the compta donation table.

nodes.name: donors_loyal.php
nodes.summary: Report view listing donors who gave consistently across multiple years.

nodes.name: donors_new.php
nodes.summary: Report view listing first-time donors for a given year.

nodes.name: donors_summary.php
nodes.summary: Large dashboard view aggregating member counts, donation totals, and tax-attestation figures, with filters for minimum donation amount and attestation inclusion.

nodes.name: import_step1.php
nodes.summary: First step of the CSV import wizard: file upload form, displaying any upload error passed via query string.

nodes.name: import_step2.php
nodes.summary: Second step of the CSV import wizard: renders the column-mapping form using headers and parsed rows held in the session.

nodes.name: import_step3.php
nodes.summary: Third step of the CSV import wizard: shows import results (created contacts count) and the duplicate-resolution UI.

nodes.name: members_lapsed.php
nodes.summary: Report view listing members whose membership (cotisation) lapsed compared to the prior year.

nodes.name: settings_app_users.php
nodes.summary: Admin-only panel for managing application user accounts (list, activate/deactivate, role, password reset state); guarded by isAdmin().

nodes.name: settings_audit_log.php
nodes.summary: Admin-only view rendering the application activity audit log.

nodes.name: settings_categories.php
nodes.summary: Admin UI for managing group categories (metagroup type used for navigation grouping).

nodes.name: settings_compta_types.php
nodes.summary: Admin UI for managing accounting entry types (compta_type), including their display color and donation-exclusion flag.

nodes.name: settings_filter_edit.php
nodes.summary: Form view for creating or editing a metagroup (category or navigation filter), including per-team checkbox assignment rows.

nodes.name: renderTeamCb
nodes.summary: Renders a single team checkbox row for the metagroup edit form, marking it checked if the team is already assigned.

nodes.name: renderAddRow
nodes.summary: Renders an add-team row in the metagroup edit form, escaping and formatting values via sprintf/htmlentities.

nodes.name: settings_filters.php
nodes.summary: Admin UI for managing navigation filters (metagroups shown in the sidebar filter list).

nodes.name: settings_general.php
nodes.summary: Main settings shell rendering the tabbed navigation (groups, filters, accounting types) and dispatching to the relevant sub-views.

nodes.name: _settings_nav_item
nodes.summary: Renders a single settings navigation tab link (icon, label, active state) with an optional drill-down indicator, escaping all output via htmlspecialchars.

nodes.name: settings_group_edit.php
nodes.summary: Form view for creating or editing a group (team); redirects back to the groups tab (via HX-Location for htmx requests) when no valid id is supplied on edit.

nodes.name: settings_groups.php
nodes.summary: Admin UI for managing groups (teams) and their member counts, computed from user_properties team_* keys.

nodes.name: _renderImportCb
nodes.summary: Render callback used while building the groups admin table, escaping values via htmlentities.

nodes.name: settings_health.php
nodes.summary: Admin health/observability panel showing read-only system status (app version, runtime, DB server, schema/migration state, volume counters, last activity) for SSH-less diagnostics.

nodes.name: settings_integrity.php
nodes.summary: Admin tool for detecting and resolving data integrity issues, such as duplicate members sharing the same first/last name.

nodes.name: suivi_delete_confirm.php
nodes.summary: Confirmation dialog view for deleting a follow-up (suivi) entry, looking up the UserProperty record to confirm before delete.

nodes.name: suivi_delete_do.php
nodes.summary: Executes deletion of a follow-up (suivi) entry, writes an audit log entry with the affected member's name, then re-renders the member's suivi tab.

nodes.name: suivi_edit_form.php
nodes.summary: Form view for editing an existing follow-up (suivi) entry tied to a member.

nodes.name: suivi_last_entry.php
nodes.summary: Report view listing members by their most recent follow-up (suivi) entry date, merged with sent-email activity from email_log.

nodes.name: suivi_list.php
nodes.summary: Form view for adding a new follow-up (suivi) entry to a member's record.

nodes.name: users_add_form.php
nodes.summary: Form view for searching existing members and adding a new member if no match is found.

nodes.name: users_anonymize.php
nodes.summary: Confirmation view that anonymizes a member's personal data (GDPR-style erasure) while keeping accounting records intact, posting to the anonymizeUser action.

nodes.name: users_deactivate_legacy.php
nodes.summary: Legacy direct-link handler that deactivates a member (sets status=0) for backward-compatible URLs, logging the action to the audit log.

nodes.name: users_delete_confirm.php
nodes.summary: Confirmation dialog letting an admin choose between archiving (deactivating) or permanently deleting a member record.

nodes.name: users_edit_form.php
nodes.summary: Form view for creating or editing a member record, including a mini-dashboard with membership/contribution stats for the current and adjacent years.

nodes.name: users_general_data.php
nodes.summary: Inline view/edit tab for a member's general contact data, using Alpine.js for client-side state and saving changes via the JSON REST API (PUT /api/members/{id}).

nodes.name: users_history.php
nodes.summary: Admin-only view listing a member's full audit trail (actions, timestamps, details) plus the member's email log, rendered as a DataTables-powered table.

nodes.name: users_inactive.php
nodes.summary: Lists deactivated (archived) members alongside the team list, allowing reactivation from within a settings-style sidebar layout.

nodes.name: users_list.php
nodes.summary: Main member list view supporting search, team/metagroup filters, column selection, sorting, and bulk membership add/remove actions — the largest and most central listing view in the app.

nodes.name: users_member_of.php
nodes.summary: Renders and handles the membership panel on a member's profile, toggling team memberships and emitting an undoable toast notification via a data sentinel element.

nodes.name: users_merge.php
nodes.summary: UI and logic for merging two duplicate member records into one, comparing contribution counts and other stats between the two candidates before merging.

nodes.name: index.php
nodes.summary: Application entry point that authenticates the user, loads locale/bootstrap/model classes, and either returns an htmx partial fragment or renders the full page shell (menu, pending-migrations banner, toast container, footer) around the routed view.
nodes.languageNotes: Dual-mode rendering: detects HX-Request header to skip full-page layout and return only the content fragment, a common htmx server pattern.

nodes.name: getMicroTime
nodes.summary: Returns the current time as a float microtime value, used to measure page render duration shown in the footer.

nodes.name: install.php
nodes.summary: Fresh-install wizard that creates the database schema, seeds initial config/admin user, and baselines migrations, exposed as a standalone script for first-time deployment.

nodes.name: installerPdo
nodes.summary: Builds and returns a PDO connection for the installer using submitted DB credentials, checking that required constants are defined before connecting.

nodes.name: app.js
nodes.summary: Application-wide JavaScript: propagates the CSRF token to htmx requests and POST forms, implements the global dirty-form guard warning on unsaved-change navigation, and re-initializes jQuery plugins (datepicker, DataTables, datahref) after every htmx swap, plus save/undo toast handling.
nodes.languageNotes: Implements the project-wide dirty-form contract documented in CLAUDE.md: window.__dirtyOverride must be set before programmatic navigation to bypass the unsaved-changes warning.

nodes.name: casaInit
nodes.summary: Re-initializes jQuery plugins (datepicker, datahref, DataTables cleanup) on a given DOM root, called on initial load and after every htmx content swap.

nodes.name: dt_defaults.js
nodes.summary: Shared default configuration for DataTables instances used across the app (loaded once in the page head).

nodes.name: member-general-form.js
nodes.summary: Alpine.js component powering the inline view/edit general-data tab on a member profile, handling edit-mode toggling, TipTap comment editor sync, date formatting, and saving via a JSON fetch PUT to the members API.

nodes.name: memberGeneralForm
nodes.summary: Alpine.js data factory defining the general-data tab's reactive state and methods: init, startEdit, formatDate, and save (which PUTs changed fields to the members REST API).

nodes.name: tiptap-editor.js
nodes.summary: Initializes and tears down the TipTap rich-text editor used for the member comment field, wiring toolbar buttons (bold, italic, lists, undo/redo) to editor commands and syncing active-state highlighting.
nodes.languageNotes: ES module loaded with type="module", cache-busted via filemtime() instead of the shared APP_VERSION query param used elsewhere.

nodes.name: initTiptap
nodes.summary: Creates a TipTap editor instance on a given root element and wires its formatting toolbar buttons to editor chain commands.

nodes.name: updateToolbar
nodes.summary: Updates the active/inactive visual state of TipTap toolbar buttons to reflect the current editor selection's formatting.

nodes.name: destroyTiptap
nodes.summary: Destroys a TipTap editor instance attached to a given root element, used to clean up before htmx swaps replace the DOM.

nodes.name: .htaccess
nodes.summary: Apache access rule denying direct HTTP access to the locales directory, which contains PHP files not meant to be served raw.

nodes.name: resources_fr.php
nodes.summary: Base French locale bundle exposing all user-facing strings via $GLOBAL — the default and fallback locale that other language files (en/de/es) override on top of.

nodes.name: log4php.properties
nodes.summary: Log4php logging configuration setting appender and log level defaults for the application (legacy logging config, minimal in scope).

nodes.name: login.php
nodes.summary: Login page handling credential validation, CSRF-protected form submission, brute-force throttling (usleep + audit log on failure), and session cookie initialization with secure/httponly/SameSite flags.

nodes.name: members.iml
nodes.summary: JetBrains IDE module configuration file for the PHP project, defining content roots and PHP interpreter settings for IntelliJ/PhpStorm.

nodes.name: .htaccess
nodes.summary: Apache access rule denying direct HTTP access to the migrations directory, preventing raw SQL migration files from being downloaded.

nodes.name: set-password.php
nodes.summary: Public, unauthenticated page allowing a new user to set their initial password via a token-based invite link generated by an admin, with expiry and reuse checks.

nodes.name: backup.sh
nodes.summary: Shell script that dumps the MemberBase MySQL/MariaDB database to a timestamped SQL file using mysqldump with consistent, non-locking options, resolving DB credentials from env vars or conf/db.php.

nodes.name: fix_encoding.php
nodes.summary: One-shot CLI/browser maintenance script that repairs CP1252/UTF-8 mojibake in a specified users table column, with a dry-run debug mode; intended to be run once then deleted.

nodes.name: guest2010.php
nodes.summary: One-off legacy tool that reads a tab-separated 2010.txt export and renders it as an HTML table for manual review; contains commented-out code for creating User records from the rows.

nodes.name: import.php
nodes.summary: Near-duplicate of guest2010.php that previews a 2010.txt contact export as an HTML table, with a fuller commented-out block showing the intended User creation and membership-add logic.

nodes.name: migrate.php
nodes.summary: CLI entry point for the database migration runner: applies pending migrations from html/migrations, reports status (including checksum drift detection), or baselines a fresh install; shares core logic with the web-based admin migration UI via includes/lib/migrations.php.
nodes.languageNotes: CLI-only guard (PHP_SAPI check) and DB config resolution mirrors bootstrap.php without side effects, so it can run standalone before the app framework loads.

nodes.name: restore.sh
nodes.summary: Destructive database restore script that loads a SQL dump (produced by backup.sh) into MariaDB, resolving DB credentials from environment variables or conf/db.php.

nodes.name: playwright.config.ts
nodes.summary: Playwright test runner configuration: sets the base URL, admin auth storage state, serial (non-parallel) execution, and wires a 'setup' project running global-setup.ts before the chromium test project.

nodes.name: api.spec.ts
nodes.summary: End-to-end tests for the REST API covering compta-types, members, compta (accounting entries), suivi (follow-up notes), and groups endpoints, largely run in serial describe blocks due to shared state.

nodes.name: app-users.spec.ts
nodes.summary: E2E tests for application user management: listing, creating, and deleting app users, run serially since operations build on prior state.

nodes.name: auth.spec.ts
nodes.summary: E2E tests for authentication flows: login, logout, and access denial for unauthenticated sessions, using the shared login helper.

nodes.name: change-password.spec.ts
nodes.summary: E2E test verifying the password change flow and subsequent restoration of the original password, using a full-page POST (hx-boost disabled) to avoid htmx race conditions.

nodes.name: compta-types.spec.ts
nodes.summary: E2E tests for accounting-type settings: adding and deleting a compta type from the settings UI.

nodes.name: compta.spec.ts
nodes.summary: E2E tests for accounting entries (compta): viewing, adding, editing, and deleting a donation/accounting record.

nodes.name: db-maintenance.spec.ts
nodes.summary: E2E test for the admin Health page's database maintenance feature, verifying database export works without SSH access.

nodes.name: dirty-guard.spec.ts
nodes.summary: E2E tests for the global unsaved-changes ('dirty form') guard in app.js: verifies the navigation-blocking popup triggers on edits and is correctly bypassed for excluded controls and __dirtyOverride navigation.

nodes.name: filter-parity.spec.ts
nodes.summary: E2E test verifying that server-rendered list filters produce results consistent with client-side (DataTables) filtering, guarding against filter logic drift between backend and frontend.

nodes.name: global-setup.ts
nodes.summary: Playwright global setup: resets the test database via fixtures/reset-db.sh, then logs in as each seeded role (admin, manager, user, readonly) and persists their auth storage state files for reuse across the whole test suite.

nodes.name: globalSetup
nodes.summary: Default-exported Playwright global setup function that resets the test DB and logs in as every seeded persona, writing per-role storage-state JSON files under tests/.auth/.

nodes.name: groups.spec.ts
nodes.summary: E2E tests for groups (teams): viewing, creating, renaming, and deleting a group, run serially.

nodes.name: health.spec.ts
nodes.summary: E2E test for the admin Health page, verifying its basic rendering and content.

nodes.name: login.ts
nodes.summary: Shared Playwright test helper that logs a user in through the login form and waits for post-login navigation, reused across auth-dependent E2E specs.

nodes.name: login
nodes.summary: Fills the login form with the given username/password, clicks submit, and waits for navigation to complete — the standard login entry point used by dependent test specs.

nodes.name: inactive-members.spec.ts
nodes.summary: E2E tests for the inactive-members workflow: deactivating a member, listing archived members, and reactivating one.

nodes.name: getNewUserId
nodes.summary: Test helper that extracts the newly-created member's userid from the first matching profile link on the page after a create action.

nodes.name: members.spec.ts
nodes.summary: E2E tests for member management: listing, searching, adding, editing, and deleting a member record.

nodes.name: getNewUserId
nodes.summary: Test helper that extracts the newly-created member's userid from the first matching profile link on the page after a create action.

nodes.name: merge-users.spec.ts
nodes.summary: E2E tests for merging two member records into one, verifying data consolidation and cleanup of the duplicate.

nodes.name: getNewUserId
nodes.summary: Test helper that extracts the newly-created member's userid from the first matching profile link on the page after a create action.

nodes.name: metagroups.spec.ts
nodes.summary: E2E tests for metagroups (saved filters): creating, renaming, and deleting a metagroup, run serially.

nodes.name: mobile-roles.spec.ts
nodes.summary: E2E tests for the mobile navigation bar's role-gated behavior: settings-gear visibility for managers, common elements visible to every role, and direct-URL access still denied for guarded views on mobile.

nodes.name: stateFile
nodes.summary: Resolves the path to a persisted Playwright auth storage-state file for a given role.

nodes.name: openMobileAs
nodes.summary: Opens a new mobile-viewport browser context and page authenticated as the given role, using the role's saved storage state.

nodes.name: personas.spec.ts
nodes.summary: E2E tests exercising role-based view guards and the REST API across the seeded admin/manager/user/readonly personas, verifying UI and API access control matches each role's permissions.

nodes.name: stateFile
nodes.summary: Resolves the path to a persisted Playwright auth storage-state file for a given persona role.

nodes.name: openAs
nodes.summary: Opens a new browser context and page authenticated as the given persona role, using the role's saved storage state.

nodes.name: apiAs
nodes.summary: Creates an authenticated Playwright APIRequestContext for the given persona role, for driving REST API assertions directly.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Documentation for the Playwright E2E test suite: prerequisites, how to run tests, configuration reference, an index of test files and what each covers, seed test data, and testing conventions (serial blocks, htmx race workarounds).

nodes.name: resume.spec.ts
nodes.summary: Playwright E2E tests for the donation summary (resume) view, checking that KPI cards render and that the year/minimum-amount filters update the page correctly.

nodes.name: roles.spec.ts
nodes.summary: Playwright E2E suite exercising role-based access control (readonly/user/manager/admin) both at the UI level (visibility of action elements) and the API level (forced HTTP calls rejected with 403), using pre-authenticated storage states per role.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses Playwright storageState files per role plus a CSRF-token scraping helper to exercise the server-side role guard independently of the CSRF guard.

nodes.name: stateFile
nodes.summary: Resolves the path to the saved Playwright storageState JSON file for a given role.

nodes.name: openAs
nodes.summary: Opens a new authenticated browser context and page for the given role using its saved storage state.

nodes.name: apiAs
nodes.summary: Creates a Playwright API request context authenticated as the given role, for direct server-side API/action assertions.

nodes.name: csrfFor
nodes.summary: Fetches the CSRF token exposed in the page meta tag for an authenticated API context, needed to bypass the CSRF guard and isolate role-guard testing.

nodes.name: route-guards.spec.ts
nodes.summary: Playwright E2E suite exercising the role x route access-guard matrix by direct URL access, including regression tests for two previously-vulnerable routes (deleteUserConfirm, removeSuiviConfirm) that were reachable without a role check.

nodes.name: stateFile
nodes.summary: Resolves the path to the saved Playwright storageState JSON file for a given role.

nodes.name: openAs
nodes.summary: Opens a new authenticated browser context and page for the given role using its saved storage state.

nodes.name: schema-drift.spec.ts
nodes.summary: Pure Node/Playwright-runner test (no browser, no DB) that parses schema.sql and the schema embedded in install.php and asserts they define identical tables and columns, guarding against a past regression where a new column existed only in schema.sql.

nodes.name: parseSchema
nodes.summary: Parses raw SQL CREATE TABLE statements into a map of table name to normalized column definitions for comparison.

nodes.name: loadEmbeddedSchema
nodes.summary: Reads install.php and extracts the heredoc-embedded copy of the database schema for comparison against schema.sql.

nodes.name: security-log.spec.ts
nodes.summary: Playwright E2E tests verifying that failed login attempts and denied access events are recorded in the application's security audit log.

nodes.name: settings.spec.ts
nodes.summary: Playwright E2E tests for the settings page tab navigation (general, groups, categories, compta types) and for saving/persisting the default_team setting via htmx.

nodes.name: suivi.spec.ts
nodes.summary: Playwright E2E serial suite covering CRUD operations (view, add, edit, delete) for member follow-up notes (suivi).

nodes.name: tiptap.spec.ts
nodes.summary: Playwright E2E test guarding against regressions in the self-hosted TipTap rich-text editor bundle by asserting the ProseMirror editor mounts on the member form.

nodes.name: bootstrap.php
nodes.summary: PHPUnit bootstrap for the pure-logic unit test suite; defines APP_ENTRY and requires only side-effect-free library files (locale, pure helpers, import field helpers, Compta entity) without opening a DB connection.

nodes.name: ImportFieldsTest.php
nodes.summary: PHPUnit unit tests for the CSV import field-mapping helpers, covering sex-value normalization, field value passthrough, and consistency between the allowed-fields list and their labels.

nodes.name: ImportFieldsTest
nodes.summary: PHPUnit TestCase exercising the pure functions importNormalizeSexe, importFieldValue, importFieldLabels and importAllowedFields from html/includes/lib/import_fields.php.

nodes.name: PureHelpersTest.php
nodes.summary: PHPUnit unit tests for the side-effect-free date and string helpers (formatedDateToTimeStamp, timeStampToformatedDate, unquote) covering round-trips, empty/null input, out-of-range and malformed dates, and typographic apostrophe normalization.

nodes.name: PureHelpersTest
nodes.summary: PHPUnit TestCase exercising the pure date/string helper functions from html/includes/lib/pure.php.

nodes.name: assert.sh
nodes.summary: Bash script that asserts a legacy database, seeded from tests/fixtures/legacy.sql, has correctly converged to the current schema after migrate.php ran — checking each of the 12 migrations' column/table effects, data conversions, and the schema_migrations tracking table. Invoked by the upgrade CI workflow.

nodes.name: q
nodes.summary: Runs a scalar SQL query against the target database via mysql client, returning a trimmed tab-separated result.

nodes.name: fail
nodes.summary: Prints a FAIL message and exits the script with a non-zero status.

nodes.name: views.spec.ts
nodes.summary: Playwright E2E smoke tests for read-only reporting views (audit log, user history, last compta/suivi entries, loyal/lapsed/new donors, integrity check), each verified to load without error.

nodes.name: compta_recap.php
nodes.summary: Action handler that sends compta recap emails to members with unnotified accounting entries, grouping rows per member and marking them notified after sending.

nodes.name: _recapLoadEntries
nodes.summary: Loads compta entries eligible for recap emails, grouped by member, with optional user/year filters and a force flag to include already-notified rows.

nodes.name: _recapSinceLine
nodes.summary: Builds the French 'since_line' phrase for recap emails, describing the period covered based on year filter or last batch send date.

nodes.name: _recapBuildVars
nodes.summary: Builds the full template variable array (entries table, totals, salutation, org info) used to render a member's recap email.

nodes.name: cotisation_reminder.php
nodes.summary: Action handler that sends cotisation reminder emails to members who paid last year but not the current year, skipping members already reminded via email_log.

nodes.name: _cotiReminderVars
nodes.summary: Builds the template variable array (salutation, membership URL, org info) for one member's cotisation reminder email.

nodes.name: locale.php
nodes.summary: UI locale loading library that populates $GLOBAL with the French base resource bundle and layers the requested language's overrides on top, with transparent fallback.
nodes.languageNotes: Fallback-by-layering pattern: always requires the French bundle first, then overrides with the target locale, so missing keys never break the UI.

nodes.name: mbAvailableLocales
nodes.summary: Returns the map of supported UI locale codes to their native language names.

nodes.name: mbNormalizeLocale
nodes.summary: Normalizes any user-supplied locale string to a supported locale code, defaulting to French when unrecognized.

nodes.name: mbLoadLocale
nodes.summary: Loads the French base locale bundle into $GLOBAL then layers the requested language's override bundle on top, storing the active locale code.

nodes.name: mailer.php
nodes.summary: Minimal pure-PHP SMTP client and high-level mail helpers: raw SMTP send with STARTTLS/SSL/AUTH support, password encryption, email logging, template loading/rendering, and salutation building used across all outbound emails.
nodes.languageNotes: Implements the SMTP protocol by hand over raw sockets (no PHPMailer dependency), including manual multipart/alternative MIME construction and dot-stuffing.

nodes.name: mbSmtpSend
nodes.summary: Sends an email via a hand-rolled SMTP client supporting plain/STARTTLS/SSL, AUTH LOGIN/PLAIN, and multipart/alternative HTML bodies.

nodes.name: mbSmtpEncryptPassword
nodes.summary: Encrypts the SMTP password using AES-256-CBC with a per-installation key for storage in app_settings.

nodes.name: mbSmtpDecryptPassword
nodes.summary: Decrypts the stored SMTP password using AES-256-CBC with the per-installation encryption key.

nodes.name: mbSmtpGetOrCreateEncKey
nodes.summary: Reads the per-installation SMTP encryption key from app_settings, generating and persisting a new random key if none exists.

nodes.name: mbSendMail
nodes.summary: High-level send helper that reads SMTP config from global app settings, sends via mbSmtpSend, and logs the outcome to email_log without ever throwing.

nodes.name: _mbLogEmail
nodes.summary: Inserts one row into email_log for a send attempt, retrying with a reduced column set if newer migration columns don't yet exist.

nodes.name: mbDefaultTemplates
nodes.summary: Returns the built-in fallback email templates (payment receipt, cotisation reminder, donation attestation, compta recap) with inline-CSS HTML wrapping, used when the DB template table is empty or not yet migrated.

nodes.name: mbGetTemplate
nodes.summary: Loads an email template from the email_templates DB table by key, falling back to the built-in default template when the table or row is missing.

nodes.name: mbBuildSalutation
nodes.summary: Builds greeting and display-name template variables from a contact's first/last name and society, handling the society-only (no personal name) case.

nodes.name: mbRenderTemplate
nodes.summary: Replaces {{placeholder}} tokens in a template string with values from an associative array.

nodes.name: mbSendTemplate
nodes.summary: Loads a named email template, renders it with the given variables, and sends it via mbSendMailWithError, returning true or an error string.

nodes.name: mbSendMailWithError
nodes.summary: Like mbSendMail but returns true on success or the specific error string on failure, and records the template key used in email_log.

nodes.name: email_log_section.php
nodes.summary: Reusable partial that renders a member's sent-email history table (from email_log) inside the member suivi page.

nodes.name: compta_recap.php
nodes.summary: Manager-only view showing a preview table of pending compta recap emails filtered by year, with a per-member send modal and bulk-send controls.

nodes.name: email_detail.php
nodes.summary: Manager-only view that renders the full content (HTML or plain-text) of one sent email loaded from email_log, using a sandboxed iframe for HTML bodies.

nodes.name: settings_email.php
nodes.summary: Admin-only SMTP configuration form (Settings → Email tab) for setting host, port, encryption, and auth credentials, submitted via htmx.

nodes.name: settings_email_log.php
nodes.summary: Admin-only view listing all sent emails across the system (email_log), with filters and links to email detail.

nodes.name: settings_email_templates.php
nodes.summary: Admin-only view for editing configurable email templates (subject, plain-text and HTML body) stored in email_templates, seeded from mbDefaultTemplates.

nodes.name: datahref2.jquery.js
nodes.summary: jQuery plugin that makes any element with a data-href attribute clickable like a link, while letting nested real links/buttons handle their own clicks instead of being hijacked.

nodes.name: resources_de.php
nodes.summary: German UI locale resource bundle, loaded on top of the French default to override translated strings via $GLOBAL.

nodes.name: resources_en.php
nodes.summary: English UI locale resource bundle, loaded on top of the French default to override translated strings via $GLOBAL.

nodes.name: resources_es.php
nodes.summary: Spanish UI locale resource bundle, loaded on top of the French default to override translated strings via $GLOBAL.

nodes.name: app_users
nodes.summary: Migration adding a per-user UI locale column to app_users, defaulting to French, so each admin/manager can pick their preferred interface language.

nodes.name: app_settings
nodes.summary: Migration widening app_settings.value to TEXT to support multi-line configuration fields such as org_purpose.

nodes.name: email_log
nodes.summary: Migration creating the email_log table, one row per send attempt (success or failure) with timestamp, recipient, subject, and status.

nodes.name: email_templates
nodes.summary: Migration creating the email_templates table for configurable per-key subject and plain-text body content.

nodes.name: compta
nodes.summary: Migration adding a notified_at timestamp column and index to compta, tracking which accounting entries have already been included in a recap email batch.

nodes.name: compta
nodes.summary: Migration adding a cotisation_year column and index to compta, tracking which membership year a cotisation entry covers independently of its payment date.

nodes.name: compta
nodes.summary: Data-backfill migration populating cotisation_year for existing compta rows from their payment date, covering the legacy upgrade path.

nodes.name: email_templates
nodes.summary: Migration adding a body_html column to email_templates to support multipart/alternative HTML emails.

nodes.name: email_log
nodes.summary: Migration adding user_id and rendered body_text/body_html columns to email_log, enabling per-member email history in the suivi page.

nodes.name: email_log
nodes.summary: Migration adding a tpl_key column and index to email_log so sent emails can be queried by template type without parsing subject text.

nodes.name: cotisation-reminders.spec.ts
nodes.summary: Playwright E2E test suite covering cotisation reminder emails and the lapsed-members view, verifying delivery via Mailpit.

nodes.name: openReminderModal
nodes.summary: Test helper that opens the send-reminder modal and waits for Bootstrap's shown.bs.modal event before proceeding.

nodes.name: purgeMailpit
nodes.summary: Test helper that deletes all captured messages in Mailpit so each test starts with a clean inbox.

nodes.name: datahref-nested-link.spec.ts
nodes.summary: Playwright regression test verifying the datahref2.jquery.js vendor plugin lets nested links/buttons inside a clickable row handle their own clicks instead of being hijacked.

nodes.name: locale.spec.ts
nodes.summary: Playwright E2E test suite verifying per-user UI locale switching, persistence in app_users.locale, and fallback behavior.

nodes.name: switchLocale
nodes.summary: Test helper that navigates to the change-password page and submits the changeLocale action to switch the UI language.

nodes.name: team-filter.spec.ts
nodes.summary: Playwright E2E test suite covering the team-filter-input dropdown search behavior in the navbar.

nodes.name: ComptaYearTest.php
nodes.summary: PHPUnit unit test suite for Compta::setCotisationYear() validation logic, covering null/empty, current/next/past year bounds, string coercion, and the COALESCE effective-year fallback.

nodes.name: ComptaYearTest
nodes.summary: PHPUnit test case exercising the Compta class's cotisation-year setter/getter validation rules in isolation from the database.

nodes.name: publish-site.sh
nodes.summary: Publishes the latest CHANGELOG.md entry to the gh-pages documentation site by patching only the changelog section of index.html via site-release.mjs, committing and pushing to the gh-pages branch.

nodes.name: release.sh
nodes.summary: Core release script: bumps APP_VERSION in bootstrap.php, commits, tags, pushes, creates a GitHub release from the changelog entry, and triggers the gh-pages site publish step.

nodes.name: site-release.mjs
nodes.summary: Node script that deterministically patches the gh-pages index.html changelog section by inserting the latest CHANGELOG.md entry as an accessible HTML article block, keeping only the 3 most recent releases visible.

nodes.name: escapeHtml
nodes.summary: Escapes HTML special characters when converting changelog markdown text into safe inline HTML.

nodes.name: inlineMd
nodes.summary: Converts inline markdown (bold, code, links) in a changelog line into the site's existing accessible HTML markup.

nodes.name: backup.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions workflow that proves the backup/restore cycle is faithful: seeds a known MariaDB database, runs backup.sh, drops every table, restores with restore.sh, and verifies row counts and sums match the baseline.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses a MariaDB 11 service container with health checks; verification compares COUNT/SUM baselines captured before the simulated data loss.

nodes.name: e2e.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions workflow running the Playwright end-to-end suite: boots the app via Docker Compose (base + test overrides), waits for the login page to respond, resets the test database, and runs Playwright with report upload on failure.

nodes.name: unit.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions workflow running the PHPUnit unit test suite on PHP 8.2 (matching the production runtime) after installing Composer dev dependencies, on every push to main and pull request.

nodes.name: upgrade.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions workflow proving the migration runner converges a legacy pre-migrations database to the current schema: loads legacy.sql, runs migrate.php, asserts schema/data/tracking convergence, and checks idempotence and drift-free --status.
nodes.languageNotes: Verifies migration idempotence by asserting the second run reports no pending migrations, and drift detection via migrate.php --status exit code.

nodes.name: 0001_email_alt.sql
nodes.summary: Database migration adding an email_alt column (alternate/historical email address) to the users table, introduced in v3.5.4.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses MariaDB's ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS for idempotent re-application.

nodes.name: 0002_compta_sum_decimal.sql
nodes.summary: Database migration converting the compta.sum financial amount column from VARCHAR to DECIMAL(10,2), first normalizing comma decimal separators and zeroing non-numeric values so the ALTER cannot fail.
nodes.languageNotes: Defensive migration pattern: data is sanitized with UPDATE statements before the column type change, since MySQL DDL is auto-committed and cannot be rolled back.

nodes.name: BootstrapXL.css
nodes.summary: Tiny media-query override that widens the Bootstrap .container to 1570px on extra-large screens (min-width 1600px).

nodes.name: custom.css
nodes.summary: Main application stylesheet for MemberBase: Bootstrap 5 primary-color overrides, navbar and table theming, form section dividers, member group pills, filter buttons, DataTables toolbar styling, datetimepicker compatibility, and the settings-page sidebar layout with a mobile collapse breakpoint.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses CSS custom properties (--ca-* tokens), a prefers-reduced-motion fallback for pill animations, and a visually-hidden pattern (.hide/.hidden) so DataTables sort helpers stay readable by screen readers.

nodes.name: docs.css
nodes.summary: Vendored Bootstrap 3 documentation stylesheet (bs-docs-* classes) covering scaffolding, navigation, footer, mastheads, callouts, code highlights, and responsive test styles; used for the app's documentation-style pages rather than authored for MemberBase itself.
nodes.languageNotes: Legacy Bootstrap 3 docs CSS organized by a table-of-contents comment header; largely unmodified vendor code.

nodes.name: navbar-fixed-top.css
nodes.summary: Small color theme for the .bs-docs-nav top navbar: blue background (#6088c1), white links and brand text, and orange (#f9b036) hover/focus highlight.

nodes.name: .htaccess
nodes.summary: One-line Apache rule (Require all denied) blocking any direct HTTP access to the domain class files in html/classes/.

nodes.name: .understandignore
nodes.summary: Ignore list for the Understand-Anything analyzer, excluding vendored assets, test artifacts, logs, and generated directories from knowledge-graph scans.

nodes.name: apache.conf
nodes.summary: Apache virtual host configuration for the Docker container: serves /var/www/html, adds font/SVG MIME types, and mirrors the REST rewrite rules that map /api/members, /api/groups, /api/compta, and /api/suivi URLs onto their PHP endpoints.
nodes.languageNotes: Duplicates the rewrite rules found in html/api/.htaccess so the API works even with AllowOverride None.

nodes.name: .htaccess
nodes.summary: Apache rewrite rules that expose clean REST URLs (/api/members/{id}, /api/groups/{id}/members, /api/compta, /api/suivi, /api/compta-types) by mapping them to the corresponding PHP endpoint scripts.

nodes.name: members.iml
nodes.summary: JetBrains IDE module descriptor for the project; editor metadata with no runtime role.

nodes.name: schema.sql
nodes.summary: Canonical MariaDB schema (all CREATE TABLE statements) — mirrored inside html/install.php for fresh installs; must stay in sync (tests/schema-drift.spec.ts).

layers.name: Infrastructure
layers.description: Core bootstrap, session/CSRF auth, PDO connection, routing dispatch, page entry points (index, login, install), locales, and the shared migration library

layers.name: Domain & Data
layers.description: ORM-like PHP classes for members, accounting, groups and filters, plus the MariaDB schema, its tables, and SQL migrations

layers.name: REST API
layers.description: JSON REST endpoints under /api/ with session auth and role-based access control

layers.name: Action Handlers
layers.description: POST action dispatchers for all state-changing operations (members, accounting, groups, import, settings), behind the CSRF guard

layers.name: Views & Partials
layers.description: PHP view fragments and partials rendered via htmx partial requests or full page load, including PDF attestation pages

layers.name: Frontend JS
layers.description: Client-side Alpine.js components, htmx config, dirty-form guard, DataTables setup, TipTap editor, and Bootstrap CSS customizations

layers.name: Tests
layers.description: Playwright E2E suite, PHPUnit unit tests for pure business logic, SQL fixtures/seeds, upgrade assertions, and test runner configs

layers.name: Documentation
layers.description: Guides for users, admins, API consumers, contributors, and production operators, plus project README and changelog

layers.name: CLI Tools
layers.description: Command-line migration runner, backup/restore scripts, and legacy import/encoding utilities for production ops

layers.name: CI/CD & Deployment
layers.description: Docker images and compose stacks, Apache vhost config, GitHub Actions workflows, Makefile targets, issue/PR templates, and package manifests

tour.title: Project Overview
tour.description: MemberBase is an open-source PHP NGO member management system covering member records, segmented groups, accounting/donation tracking, activity follow-up, and a REST API — all behind role-based access control. The README lays out the feature set, tech stack (PHP 8.2, MariaDB, Bootstrap 5.3, htmx, Alpine.js), project layout, and installation path, giving the map this tour will retrace through actual code.

tour.title: Architecture in One Document
tour.description: Before diving into files, doc/architecture.md explains the shape you're about to see in code: htmx-driven GET requests returning partial fragments, POST actions routed through a central dispatcher, a layered structure (bootstrap, auth, routing, domain classes, views), and the database schema behind it. Keep this mental model handy — every following step is one layer of it made concrete.

tour.title: Application Entry Point
tour.description: html/index.php is where every browser request lands: it authenticates the session, loads the locale bundle and bootstrap/model classes, then either renders an htmx partial fragment or the full page shell (menu, pending-migrations banner). This dual GET behavior — full page vs. fragment — is the backbone of the htmx navigation model described in the architecture doc.
tour.languageLesson: htmx apps often serve the same route twice: a full HTML document on direct navigation, and a bare fragment when the request carries an HX-Request header, so the same PHP endpoint can answer both a browser and an htmx-driven partial swap.

tour.title: Bootstrap and Authentication
tour.description: Two foundational includes sit under every page: bootstrap.php establishes the DB connection and shared helpers (timezone, APP_VERSION, audit-log utilities), while auth.php handles session setup, login/logout, CSRF token generation/verification, and role guards (isAdmin, isManager, canWrite, canRead). Nearly every other PHP file in the app depends on these two — auth.php has the highest fan-in in the whole codebase, which tells you how central it is.

tour.title: The Domain Model
tour.description: The core business objects live as PHP classes: User (a member record, with membership/payment status helpers and the filtered listing query behind the members list), Team (a group), and Metagroup (a collection of teams). These classes wrap the database tables from the architecture doc and are the objects every action handler and API endpoint ultimately manipulates.

tour.title: Database Schema
tour.description: The core tables back the domain classes from Step 5: users holds member records and the status flag that every listing must filter on, compta is the accounting ledger behind donation receipts, and team/metagroup mirror the Team/Metagroup classes. schema_migrations tracks which of the incremental migration files have been applied, the mechanism explained next.
tour.languageLesson: Schema evolution here is migration-based rather than a single static schema.sql: each change ships as its own numbered SQL file, applied in order and checksummed to detect drift between what was recorded as applied and what the file now contains.

tour.title: POST Actions and CSRF Routing
tour.description: Every state-changing request goes through includes/routing/actions.php, which verifies the CSRF token on the session before dispatching to a handler file under includes/actions/ keyed by action name. This is the single choke point the CLAUDE.md conventions describe: htmx and native form submissions both get the token stamped automatically, so this router is the one place CSRF enforcement actually happens.

tour.title: REST API Layer
tour.description: Parallel to the htmx/actions flow, html/api/ exposes a session-authenticated JSON REST API. api/_bootstrap.php provides the shared apiError() helper and audit logging every endpoint uses; members.php, groups.php, and compta.php are the busiest files in the codebase by fan-out, each implementing full CRUD with role checks, filters, and nested lookups (e.g. a member's groups and accounting entries in one response).

tour.title: Email and Notifications Subsystem
tour.description: A major addition: html/includes/lib/mailer.php is a dependency-free SMTP client (mbSmtpSend/mbSendMail/mbSendTemplate) shared by two action handlers — compta_recap.php (grouped accounting-entry recap emails, with a per-member HTML preview) and cotisation_reminder.php (unpaid-cotisation reminders, with a per-year anti-duplicate guard via email_log.tpl_key). settings.php's action handler manages SMTP configuration, editable email_templates, and the email_log journal (resend/purge). Locally every outgoing message is captured by the Mailpit service instead of a real SMTP server, which is how this whole subsystem is verified end-to-end in Playwright.

tour.title: Frontend: htmx, Alpine.js, and the Dirty-Form Guard
tour.description: html/js/app.js ties the frontend together: it propagates the CSRF token to every htmx request and POST form, and implements the global dirty-form guard that warns on navigation away from unsaved changes — the pattern the project's own conventions insist every new nav element must opt into correctly. Locale strings are never hardcoded; resources_fr.php is the base bundle that every view pulls user-facing text from, with en/de/es files layered on top per the multilingual UI.
tour.languageLesson: Alpine.js and htmx favor server-rendered HTML with small client-side behavior sprinkled in via attributes, rather than a client-side framework owning the whole page — state largely stays in the DOM and the server, not in JS objects.

tour.title: Testing Strategy
tour.description: Two complementary suites cover the app: Playwright E2E tests (tests/api.spec.ts and friends) drive real browser flows against a seeded database and Mailpit for email assertions, largely serialized where tests share state; PHPUnit unit tests exercise pure business logic with no DB dependency. tests/README.md documents how to run both, the seed data, and the serial-test conventions that keep the suite reliable.

tour.title: Containerized Deployment
tour.description: The Dockerfile builds a PHP 8.2 Apache image with the pdo/pdo_mysql extensions and pdftk-java (for PDF attestations) baked in, plus the Apache modules the app needs (rewrite, headers, compression). docker-compose.yml wires that image together with MariaDB, Mailpit for email capture, and Adminer for DB inspection — the same stack Step 9's email flow and Step 11's E2E tests both run against locally.
tour.languageLesson: Docker Compose's depends_on with health checks ensures the app container waits for MariaDB to actually accept connections before starting, not just for the container process to launch — avoiding startup races.

tour.title: CI/CD Pipelines
tour.description: GitHub Actions runs the two test suites from Step 11 automatically: unit.yml runs PHPUnit on PHP 8.2 (matching production) on every push and PR, while e2e.yml boots the full Docker Compose stack, resets the test database, and runs the Playwright suite against it. This is the capstone that ties the code, database, and container layers together into a single automated gate before merge.

tour.title: REST API Reference
tour.description: doc/api.md is the living contract for the API layer from Step 8: authentication, role/permission rules, response formats, and every endpoint (members, groups, compta, compta types, suivi) with examples. Cross-reference this against the api/*.php files whenever you need to know exactly what a client is allowed to send or expect back.
